sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77453" key="pani/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πανία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77453.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πλησμονή</ref></xr>, and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάνια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πλήσμια</ref></xr>, Dorian words, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1315.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dinol.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1654.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhinth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1227.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Blaes.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
